title: digitaria subcorymbosa
intro: Digitaria subcorymbosa, also known as the small crabgrass, is a type of grass that belongs to the family Poaceae. It is native to tropical and subtropical regions of Asia and Africa. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant activities. Digitaria subcorymbosa is often used to prepare herbal remedies for various health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and improving digestion, and can be prepared into teas, infusions, or tinctures for consumption.
